description: Style Note This teal blue dress, is the season's summer essential. latin quarters can be relied upon to offer a whole collection of style, and they don't disappoint with this fabulous dress. Style this with understated accessories and heeled shoes. Product Details Teal blue dress with a round neck, short sleeves with pleats, pleated on the front, a broad band on the waistline and two insert pockets on either sides Material and Care Viscose/spandex blend Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Line dry Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
